description: An expert trader specializing in decentralized exchanges, automated market makers, and DeFi trading strategies.

questions.question: What does DEX stand for?
options: Decentralized Exchange
Digital Exchange
Data Exchange
questions.answer: Decentralized Exchange

questions.question: What is the main advantage of DEXs over centralized exchanges?
options: No need to trust a central authority with your funds
Lower transaction fees
Faster transaction processing
questions.answer: No need to trust a central authority with your funds

questions.question: What is an Automated Market Maker (AMM)?
options: A protocol that uses algorithms to price assets and facilitate trades
A human trader who makes markets
A centralized trading bot
questions.answer: A protocol that uses algorithms to price assets and facilitate trades

questions.question: What is a liquidity pool?
options: A smart contract holding tokens that traders can swap against
A storage facility for cryptocurrencies
A group of professional traders
questions.answer: A smart contract holding tokens that traders can swap against

questions.question: What is slippage in DEX trading?
options: The difference between expected and actual trade prices
A fee charged by the DEX
The time delay in trade execution
questions.answer: The difference between expected and actual trade prices

questions.question: What is impermanent loss?
options: The temporary loss of value when providing liquidity compared to holding tokens
A permanent loss of funds in a hack
The loss due to high gas fees
questions.answer: The temporary loss of value when providing liquidity compared to holding tokens

questions.question: What is Uniswap?
options: A popular decentralized exchange on Ethereum
A centralized cryptocurrency exchange
A blockchain network
questions.answer: A popular decentralized exchange on Ethereum

questions.question: What does TVL stand for in DeFi?
options: Total Value Locked
Total Volume Traded
Total Verified Liquidity
questions.answer: Total Value Locked

questions.question: What is a liquidity provider (LP)?
options: Someone who deposits tokens into a liquidity pool
A company that runs a DEX
A market maker on centralized exchanges
questions.answer: Someone who deposits tokens into a liquidity pool

questions.question: What are LP tokens?
options: Tokens representing your share in a liquidity pool
Tokens used to pay for transactions
Governance tokens for DEX protocols
questions.answer: Tokens representing your share in a liquidity pool

questions.question: What is arbitrage in DEX trading?
options: Profiting from price differences between different exchanges
Trading with borrowed funds
Providing liquidity to earn fees
questions.answer: Profiting from price differences between different exchanges

questions.question: What is a DEX aggregator?
options: A service that finds the best prices across multiple DEXs
A tool for creating new DEXs
A type of liquidity pool
questions.answer: A service that finds the best prices across multiple DEXs

questions.question: What is yield farming?
options: Earning rewards by providing liquidity or staking tokens
Growing crops using blockchain technology
Mining cryptocurrency
questions.answer: Earning rewards by providing liquidity or staking tokens

questions.question: What is a flash loan?
options: An uncollateralized loan that must be repaid in the same transaction
A very fast loan approval process
A loan with flashing interest rates
questions.answer: An uncollateralized loan that must be repaid in the same transaction

questions.question: What is MEV?
options: Maximal Extractable Value
Market Exchange Value
Minimum Execution Value
questions.answer: Maximal Extractable Value

questions.question: What is front-running in DEX trading?
options: Placing a transaction ahead of another to profit from price movement
Running a DEX protocol
Being the first to provide liquidity
questions.answer: Placing a transaction ahead of another to profit from price movement

questions.question: What is a constant product market maker?
options: An AMM where x * y = k (constant)
A market maker with constant prices
A market maker with constant volume
questions.answer: An AMM where x * y = k (constant)

questions.question: What is PancakeSwap?
options: A popular DEX on Binance Smart Chain
A DEX on Ethereum
A centralized exchange
questions.answer: A popular DEX on Binance Smart Chain

questions.question: What is SushiSwap?
options: A fork of Uniswap with additional features
A centralized sushi marketplace
A blockchain for food trading
questions.answer: A fork of Uniswap with additional features

questions.question: What is a trading pair?
options: Two tokens that can be swapped against each other
Two traders working together
A matched buy and sell order
questions.answer: Two tokens that can be swapped against each other

questions.question: What is price impact?
options: How much a trade affects the token price
The impact of gas fees on profitability
The effect of market news on prices
questions.answer: How much a trade affects the token price

questions.question: What is a rug pull in DeFi?
options: When developers drain liquidity and abandon a project
A legitimate exit strategy
A type of smart contract upgrade
questions.answer: When developers drain liquidity and abandon a project

questions.question: What is stableswap?
options: An AMM optimized for trading similar-value assets
A stable version of any DEX
Trading only stablecoins
questions.answer: An AMM optimized for trading similar-value assets

questions.question: What is Curve Finance?
options: A DEX specialized for stablecoin trading
A lending protocol
A derivatives exchange
questions.answer: A DEX specialized for stablecoin trading

questions.question: What is Balancer?
options: A DEX that allows pools with multiple tokens and custom weights
A tool for balancing portfolios
A cross-chain bridge
questions.answer: A DEX that allows pools with multiple tokens and custom weights

questions.question: What is a bonding curve?
options: A mathematical function that determines token price based on supply
A curve showing price over time
A lending interest rate curve
questions.answer: A mathematical function that determines token price based on supply

questions.question: What is 1inch?
options: A DEX aggregator that finds optimal trading routes
A measurement unit for tokens
A specific trading pair
questions.answer: A DEX aggregator that finds optimal trading routes

questions.question: What is concentrated liquidity?
options: Providing liquidity within specific price ranges for better capital efficiency
Concentrating all liquidity in one pool
A type of centralized liquidity
questions.answer: Providing liquidity within specific price ranges for better capital efficiency

questions.question: What is a cross-chain DEX?
options: A DEX that allows trading between different blockchains
A DEX that crosses different time zones
A DEX with crossed trading pairs
questions.answer: A DEX that allows trading between different blockchains

questions.question: What is the difference between V2 and V3 of Uniswap?
options: V3 introduced concentrated liquidity and multiple fee tiers
V3 is faster than V2
V3 supports more tokens than V2
questions.answer: V3 introduced concentrated liquidity and multiple fee tiers
